name: Dimerix Limited
analysis: DXB has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 69% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.2050, stop A$0.1559, target A$0.2300 (0.51:1) — then trail it.
